common.name: Name
common.add_another_file: Upload another file or drop here

wiki.title: Help Wiki
wiki.fallback_banner: This page is not yet available in English — showing German content.

landing.hero_subheadline: Whether it's a school project, your own invention, or a creative experiment – submit your 3D model and pick it up printed at the Makerspace.
landing.feature_fast_desc: Most orders are done within a few days – you'll get a notification as soon as your print is ready for pickup.
landing.feature_quality_desc: Our printers deliver clean results – whether for presentations, competitions, or personal projects.
landing.feature_status_desc: Track your order online and see exactly which step it's currently in.
landing.feature_questions_desc: The Makerspace team is happy to help – with file issues, material choices, or any other questions.
landing.how_headline: Three steps to your finished print
landing.step1_desc: Describe your project, upload your 3D file and choose the right material.
landing.step2_desc: The Makerspace team reviews your order and starts printing. You'll be kept informed of progress.
landing.step3_desc: Once your model is ready, you'll get a notification and can pick it up at the Makerspace.
landing.order_subheadline: Fill out the form – the Makerspace team will get back to you.

auth.reset_subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.reset_sent: If an account with {email} exists, an email with a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.invalid_token: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

order_type.print_only_desc: I already have a model (e.g. from Printables) and just want it printed.
order_type.design_desc: I need a custom design or modification from you.
order_type.source_links_hint: Add links to the models you want printed, e.g. Printables, MakerWorld or Thingiverse.

order_form.title: Submit 3D Print Order
order_form.subtitle: Describe your order and upload files or images. You'll receive a tracking link to follow your order.
order_form.description_placeholder: Describe your 3D print order: material, color, size, purpose...
order_form.description_placeholder_print: Quantity, material, color and any notes for the print...
order_form.required_fields_error: Please fill in all required fields
order_form.file_type_not_allowed: {name} has a file type that isn't allowed
order_form.consent_default: I agree to the processing of my data.
order_form.upload_partial_error: Order created, but file upload failed
order_form.success_desc: Your order has been registered. Please save the following tracking link.
order_form.success_save_link: Save this link! A confirmation email with the link has been sent to your email address.

track.title: Order Status
track.unavailable_desc: Online order tracking is currently disabled. Please contact us directly for an update on your order.
track.upload_more_desc: Upload revised models or additional reference images.
track.design_approval_desc: We need your design approval before we can start printing.
track.price_approval_desc: We need your agreement on the quote before we can start printing.
track.feedback_prompt: Please take our short survey – it only takes 1–2 minutes.
track.minutes_ago: {count, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}} ago
track.hours_ago: {count, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} ago
track.days_ago: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago

survey.title: How was your experience?
survey.notes_placeholder: What did you particularly like? What can we improve?
survey.already_submitted_desc: Hello {name}, your answers have already been submitted.

portal.my_orders_desc: Hello, {name} — here are all your 3D print orders.
portal.signin_subtitle: Sign in with your customer account
portal.reset_subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
portal.reset_sent: If an account with {email} exists, an email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
portal.invalid_token: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
portal.verify_error_desc: The link is no longer valid. Please sign in and request a new confirmation email.
portal.new_order_desc: Describe your 3D print order and optionally upload files.
portal.new_order_desc_placeholder: Describe your 3D print order: material, color, size, purpose...
portal.new_order_upload_error: Order created, but file upload failed
portal.not_verified_admin_desc: The team is reviewing your registration. Once your account is activated, you can place orders.
portal.not_verified_email_desc: Please check your inbox and click the confirmation link.
portal.upload_more_desc: Upload revised models or additional reference images.
portal.feedback_prompt: Please take our short survey – it only takes 1–2 minutes.
portal.quote_estimate_hint: Note: items marked as "estimate" will be replaced by actual values on the final invoice.

admin.dashboard_desc: Overview of ongoing orders and activities
admin.jobs_no_machines_desc: Add printers first to use the job queue.
admin.order_header_id_tooltip: Copy {id} — order reference for search, phone, email
admin.order_detail_customer_message_placeholde: Write a message to the customer...
admin.order_detail_customer_message_hint: This message will be emailed to {email}.
admin.order_detail_deadline_hint: Also shown as Gantt bar end
admin.order_detail_delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. The order by {name} and all associated files, comments, and history will be permanently deleted.
admin.quote_no_items: No items – add at least one before sending.
admin.invoice_needs_approved_quote: Customer must approve the quote first.
admin.invoice_issue_dialog_desc: Please verify line items and totals before issuing. Issuing allocates a sequential invoice number and archives the PDF.
admin.invoice_diff_replacements_hint: Estimated items have been replaced with actual usage values. The difference is reflected on the invoice.
admin.invoice_cancel_confirm_body: A storno invoice with a sequential number will be created. Already recorded payments are not automatically refunded.
admin.quote_sync_hint: Adds every existing part as an estimate line item — perfect before printing.
admin.quote_sync_added: {count, plural, =0 {No new items} =1 {1 item added} other {# items added}}
admin.quote_sync_none: All parts are already on the quote.
admin.quote_incomplete_estimate: Estimate incomplete — part is missing weight or filament price.
admin.toast_invalid_grams: Please enter a valid gram amount
admin.phase_manager_desc: Configure phases for the order workflow
admin.phase_is_prototype: Prototype phase (enables iteration counter on backwards move)
admin.phase_is_archive: Archive phase (orders are automatically archived on entry)
admin.phase_gate_hint: When active, moving an order into this phase is blocked until all selected conditions are met.
admin.phase_auto_advance_hint: When all selected conditions are met, the order automatically advances to the next phase.
admin.phase_no_next_phase_warning: Last phase – auto-advance has no effect.
admin.phase_condition_all_parts_misprint: All parts are marked as misprint
admin.phase_condition_days_in_phase: At least {days} days in this phase
admin.phase_condition_part_all_jobs_done: All jobs of this part are done
admin.phase_condition_part_assigned_to_job: Part is assigned to a job
admin.phase_condition_part_days_in_phase: At least {days} days in this phase
admin.phase_reason_parts_not_misprint: Not all parts are marked as misprint
admin.phase_reason_days_in_phase: Order has not been in this phase for {days} days yet
admin.phase_reason_part_jobs_not_done: Not all print jobs of this part are done
admin.phase_reason_part_not_assigned_to_job: Part is not assigned to a print job
admin.phase_reason_part_days_in_phase: Part has not been in this phase for {days} days yet
admin.phase_gate_blocked_description: The following conditions are not met. Provide a reason to override the gate.
admin.phase_gate_override_placeholder: e.g. Manually released after talking to customer
admin.phase_gate_override_too_short: Reason must be at least 5 characters
admin.phase_flow_diagram_desc: Workflow visualisation. Click a phase to configure its gate and auto-advance.
admin.part_phase_desc: Configure phases for the part workflow
admin.project_phase_desc: Configure phases for the project workflow
admin.team_desc: Manage team members and their roles
admin.machine_desc: Manage your 3D printers and their specifications
admin.inventory_no_price_warning_hint: Without a price, no automatic customer billing will occur.
admin.inventory_negative_warning: Overcommitted: stock is insufficient for planned jobs
admin.knowledge_desc: Document common problems and their solutions
admin.knowledge_empty: No entries yet. Create the first entry!
admin.knowledge_no_results: No entries found for this search.
admin.knowledge_tags_hint: Enter or comma to add · Backspace to remove
admin.knowledge_no_attachments: No attachments yet. Images and PDFs are supported (max. 20 MB).
admin.knowledge_attachments_after_save: Attachments can be added after saving.
admin.knowledge_created: Entry created — you can now add attachments
admin.customer_desc: Manage customer accounts and filament credit
admin.customer_credit_reason_placeholder: e.g. credit purchase, deduction for order...
admin.customer_all_required: Please fill in all required fields (password min. 6 characters)
admin.customer_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
admin.customer_delete_confirm: {name} will be permanently deleted. Existing orders will be retained but anonymised.
admin.verify_dialog_desc: Check each part from the print bed and mark it as successful or as a misprint.
admin.suggest_jobs_empty: No print-ready parts found that are not already assigned to a job.
admin.suggest_jobs_overuse_confirm_body: The following jobs exceed available filament stock. Schedule anyway?
admin.part_file_no_design_hint: An STL, 3MF or OBJ file defines this part. Drag it here or upload above.
admin.settings_access_code_hint: If active, users must enter a code to submit an order.
admin.settings_verification_hint: Determines how self-registered customers are activated before they can place orders.
admin.settings_verification_off: No verification – customers can order immediately
admin.settings_verification_admin: Manual by admin – activate customers under 'Customers'
admin.settings_verification_email: Via email confirmation – customers receive a confirmation link
admin.settings_verification_email_hint: Please configure the email template under the 'Emails' tab (key: Customer verification).
admin.settings_email_customer_verify_hint: Sent when verification mode 'Via email confirmation' is active. Available variables:
admin.settings_charge_misprints_help: Is filament used in failed prints billed to the customer?
admin.settings_charge_prototypes_help: Are prototype orders billed to the customer?
admin.project_detail_delete_desc: The project will be permanently deleted. Linked orders are kept.
admin.project_detail_delete_file_desc: The file will be permanently deleted.
admin.planning_lede: Who's working on what — orders across their span, with delivery dates and milestones.
admin.planning_create_hint: For appointments not tied to an order — e.g. maintenance, trade fairs, holidays or meetings. Order delivery dates and milestones are generated automatically from orders.
admin.calsub_desc: Subscribe to external iCal/ICS calendars (e.g. school-holiday or public-holiday calendars). Their entries appear read-only in Planning.

model_viewer.click_to_add: Click on the model to place a note.
model_viewer.tap_to_add: Click 'Add note' and tap on the model.
model_viewer.face_select_label: Pick face to rest on print bed
model_viewer.face_select_hint: Click a face that should rest on the print bed

errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.order_awaiting_approval: Order is awaiting approval and cannot be moved forward

welcome.title: Welcome to PrintTrack
welcome.subtitle: Walk through a real order in 7 steps - see the key features in action.
welcome.story: Dr. Weber from Leibniz High School needs 3 replacement electrons for the Bohr atom model in his classroom set. The originals are broken - deadline: 2 weeks before the next class.
welcome.no_data_saved: No real data is saved - everything stays in your browser.

kanban_drag.title: Orders board (Kanban)
kanban_drag.body: Dr. Weber's order just came in. Drag the card from 'Received' to 'In Review' to move it to the next phase.
kanban_drag.hint: -> Drag the card to the next column

open_detail.title: Open order details
open_detail.body: Great! The order is now 'In Review'. Click the card to see all the details.

model_viewer.title: Inspect the 3D part
model_viewer.body: The part section is already expanded. Click the STL file to load and inspect the 3D model in the viewer.

filament_select.title: Assign filament
filament_select.body: Assign the right material to this part. Click the filament button on the part row and select 'PLA Grey' from the list.
filament_select.hint: -> Click the filament button and select

part_phase.title: Release part for review
part_phase.body: As admin you set the phase directly. Normally the customer receives a design approval link and confirms themselves. Once confirmed, PrintTrack automatically sets the part to Print-ready. Click the phase button and select Review.

jobs_plan.title: Auto-plan print job
jobs_plan.body: The electron carriers are ready to print. Click 'Suggest print jobs' - PrintTrack plans the optimal job for the available printer. Confirm to create it.
jobs_plan.hint: -> Click Suggest, then confirm the job

job_verify.title: Verify print result
job_verify.body: The print is done (orange bar = verification pending). Click the bar, open the job, click Verify print. Mark the part as Good or Misprint, then click Complete verification.

viewer_guide.title: Using the 3D viewer
viewer_guide.body: The 3D viewer opens the model directly in your browser. Rotate with the mouse, zoom with the scroll wheel, and click the model to add annotations.
viewer_guide.hint: Rotate: left mouse  Zoom: scroll  Annotate: click the model

complete.title: Dr. Weber's replacement parts are ready!
complete.subtitle: You've explored all the key features. This is how a real order flows through PrintTrack.
complete.achievement_kanban: Kanban board - move orders through phases with drag & drop
complete.achievement_detail: Order details - description, deadline and customer info at a glance
complete.achievement_viewer: 3D viewer - inspect, rotate and annotate parts
complete.achievement_verification: Filament & phase - assign material and release part for production
complete.achievement_jobs: Auto-planner - distribute print jobs across machines automatically
complete.achievement_verify: Quality check - approve or flag individual printed parts
complete.relaunch_hint: You can restart the tutorial any time from the sidebar.

roadmap.sprint_delete_body: „{name}" contains {count, plural, =0 {no milestones} =1 {one milestone} other {# milestones}}{tasks, plural, =0 {} =1 { and one task} other { and # tasks}}. Delete anyway?
roadmap.milestone_delete_body: Delete „{name}" with {count, plural, =0 {no tasks} =1 {one task} other {# tasks}}?
roadmap.empty_sprint: No milestones in this sprint yet —
